option.name: originalContent
option.value:
Butt Cleaning Mission✨
Status: Standby
Special Toilet Operations

Uh oh stinky.....
Oliver wants to go to the toilet

Should we send him to the toilet?

EMERGENCY!

Oli Goes To The Toilet

Mission Progress: 0%
Turbo Mode Activated
Just In Time
Mission Complete
Tool Selection

Choose a Tool

Toilet Paper
Wet Wipes
Bare Hand
Remaining Poopoo
Please select a tool first, then click and drag on the ASS.
